title: InfrastructureTalosCluster
description: Root declaration CRD for a Talos cluster under Seam governance. Owned by seam-core; platform operator reconciles instances of this type. Declares whether the cluster is bootstrapped from scratch (mode=bootstrap) or imported from existing infrastructure (mode=import). On mode=import the role field is mandatory. platform-schema.md §4. Decision H.

spec.description: InfrastructureTalosCluster specification. Immutable after admission except for status fields.

mode.description: Declares whether this cluster provisions a new cluster (bootstrap) or records an existing cluster managed outside Seam (import). Immutable after creation.

role.description: Declares the role of this cluster in the Seam topology. Mandatory on mode=import; absent on mode=bootstrap.

talosVersion.description: Talos OS version for this cluster. Used by the Conductor to select a compatible conductor image per INV-012.

clusterEndpoint.description: Cluster VIP or primary API endpoint IP. Required on mode=import. Optional on mode=bootstrap (derived from bootstrap Job output). Renamed from endpoint.

nodeAddresses.description: List of node IPs belonging to this cluster. Used by DSNSReconciler to populate A records in the seam DNS zone. platform-schema.md §5.

infrastructureProvider.description: Infrastructure provider backing this cluster. native: standard path (direct bootstrap or CAPI). capi: explicit CAPI alias. screen: reserved for future Screen operator (INV-021); sets ScreenProviderNotImplemented and halts.

capi.description: CAPI integration settings. When absent the cluster uses the direct bootstrap path.

enabled.description: When true the cluster is managed via Cluster API. When false or absent the direct bootstrap path is used.

talosVersion.description: Talos version for TalosConfigTemplate and CABPT machineconfig generation. Required when enabled=true.

kubernetesVersion.description: Kubernetes version for TalosControlPlane. Required when enabled=true.

controlPlane.description: Control plane configuration. Required when enabled=true.

replicas.description: Desired number of control plane nodes.

workers.description: List of worker node pools. Each pool maps to a MachineDeployment + SeamInfrastructureMachineTemplate.

name.description: Pool identifier. Used as the MachineDeployment name suffix.

replicas.description: Desired number of worker nodes in this pool.

seamInfrastructureMachineNames.description: SeamInfrastructureMachine CR names pre-provisioned for this pool.

ciliumPackRef.description: Reference to the cluster-specific Cilium ClusterPack. Applied as the first pack after the CAPI cluster reaches Running state. Required when enabled=true. platform-schema.md §2.3.

name.description: ClusterPack CR name for the Cilium pack.

kubeconfigSecretRef.description: Name of the Secret containing the kubeconfig for this cluster. Required on mode=import. Not used when CAPI manages the lifecycle.

talosconfigSecretRef.description: Name of the Secret containing the talosconfig for this cluster.

lineage.description: Sealed causal chain record. Authored once at object creation and immutable thereafter. seam-core-schema.md §5, CLAUDE.md Decision 1.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: role must be present and one of management or tenant when mode is import

status.description: Runtime status. Written exclusively by the TalosClusterReconciler.

observedGeneration.description: Generation of the spec most recently reconciled.

origin.description: Records how the cluster came to exist. bootstrapped: created via the bootstrap path. imported: adopted via the import path.

capiClusterRef.description: Reference to the owned CAPI Cluster object in the tenant namespace. Only set for CAPI-managed clusters (capi.enabled=true).

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition list. Condition types: Ready, Bootstrapping, Bootstrapped, Importing, Degraded, CiliumPending, ControlPlaneUnreachable, PartialWorkerAvailability, ConductorReady, ScreenProviderNotImplemented, PhaseFailed, KubeconfigUnavailable.
